title: SLM
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''SLM''' was a shoulder-fired anti-aircraft missile.

The SLM was loaded into a launcher tube but needed time to arm itself; the launcher user wore a [[Visor/Legends|visor]] with a heads-up-display tracking the target, as well as an earplug that indicated the locking procedure with sound signals.

The [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] colonist [[Don Danga]] possessed an SLM launcher and attempted to defend [[Danga estate|his farm]] when it was attacked by a [[Light freighter/Legends|Corellian light freighter]], but the time needed to load was against him, and he was killed when the ship's lasers hit one SLM. Later, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] under [[Morgan Katarn]] defended the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]] and [[Trol]] with [[Jen (Human)|Jen]] were part of the missile team; they had a similar death while they tried to hit the same ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''
